nodes.label: 第 1 步：数据获取与验证
第 2 步：历史分析（3-5 年）
第 3 步：构建收入预测
第 4 步：运营费用建模
第 5 步：自由现金流计算
第 6 步：资本成本（WACC）研究
code:block5 (Cost of Equity = Risk-Free Rate + Beta × Equity Risk Premium)
code:block6 (After-Tax Cost of Debt = Pre-Tax Cost of Debt × (1 - Tax Rat)
code:block7 (Market Value Equity = Current Stock Price × Shares Outstandi)
第 7 步：折现率应用（5-10 年预测）
code:block9 (Terminal FCF = Final Year FCF × (1 + Terminal Growth Rate))
code:block10 (Terminal Value = Final Year EBITDA × Exit Multiple)
code:block11 (PV of Terminal Value = Terminal Value / (1 + WACC)^Final Per)
